resources.string: To enable the brightness slider, grant permission to adjust system brightness.

To automatically start the clock when charging:

1. Tap "Open Screensaver Settings" below, then select "Use screen saver"
2. Set "When to start" to "While charging"
3. Scroll down and select "Bedside Clock" (no need to tap Customise)
4. Tap Preview, then Back

The clock will then appear automatically whenever the phone is charging and the screen goes idle.

Tap the ⚙ gear icon (bottom-right) to customise the clock display. Tap the exit icon (bottom-left) to quit the clock.

Scroll down this page to check other vital permissions.
